fragments.title: 2026-Q1 Make execution reliably repeatable
fragments.description: Improve the operating system behind the product so launches, service recovery, reliability, and cross-functional delivery become predictably repeatable. Keeps teams accountable for operational outcomes and avoids turning roadmap delivery into a checklist of feature shipments.

fragments.title: 2026-Q1 Turn product progress into economic leverage
fragments.description: Translate better customer and operational outcomes into stronger revenue quality, retention, and strategic leverage for the business. Separates commercial results from activity metrics so leaders can evaluate whether product work is compounding into business value.

fragments.title: 2026-Q1 Individual Seller / Landlord outcome goal
fragments.description: Improve Estimation-to-listing conversion for Individual Seller / Landlord by advancing strengthen owner acquisition funnels, valuation credibility, and self-serve listing basics. through owner intent capture and listing reliability.

fragments.title: Owner Platform Initiative
fragments.description: Owner Platform Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Net proceeds / yield realization and Supply monetization revenue, anchored in lead quality and response speed while affordability pressure constrains supply and conversion and led through Estimation Funnel. The quarter concentrates on affordability pressure, lead quality, and faster response loops for supply-constrained markets so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

fragments.title: Pro Agency Platform Initiative
fragments.description: Pro Agency Platform Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Commission revenue growth and B2B ARR, anchored in lead quality and response speed while affordability pressure constrains supply and conversion and led through Pro Tool Foundation. The quarter concentrates on affordability pressure, lead quality, and faster response loops for supply-constrained markets so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

fragments.title: Owner Platform: operating discovery
fragments.description: Discovery work is testing whether owner platform can move the linked customer and business KPIs while addressing lead quality and response speed while affordability pressure constrains supply and conversion. Clarify whether this bet is strong enough to scale in the next planning cycle, or whether the organization should narrow scope and protect focus.

fragments.title: Pro Agency Platform: operating discovery
fragments.description: Discovery work is testing whether pro agency platform can move the linked customer and business KPIs while addressing lead quality and response speed while affordability pressure constrains supply and conversion. Clarify whether this bet is strong enough to scale in the next planning cycle, or whether the organization should narrow scope and protect focus.

fragments.title: Keep The Light On
fragments.description: Keep the Real Estate Marketplace domain safe, stable, secure, and operable by treating mandatory maintenance work as an explicit objective. Makes mandatory maintenance work visible as an explicit objective instead of letting it disappear into background delivery noise.

fragments.title: Keep The Light On in Real Estate Marketplace
fragments.description: Keep the light on in Real Estate Marketplace by reducing critical bugs, managing tech debt, and keeping security patching current.

fragments.title: Critical bugs
fragments.description: Reduce critical bug exposure in Real Estate Marketplace. Target: Reduce the open Sev1 and Sev2 bug backlog and restore service quickly when failures occur. Baseline: Measured from the current operational backlog.

facts.label: objective
facts.value: Keep The Light On in Real Estate Marketplace

fragments.title: Tech debt
fragments.description: Reduce structural tech debt in Real Estate Marketplace. Target: Retire high-friction legacy components, brittle workflows, and manual operational work that slows delivery. Baseline: Measured from the current engineering debt register.

facts.label: objective
facts.value: Keep The Light On in Real Estate Marketplace

fragments.title: Security patches
fragments.description: Keep security patching current in Real Estate Marketplace. Target: Keep critical and high-severity vulnerabilities within patch SLAs across production systems and dependencies. Baseline: Measured from the current vulnerability backlog and patch compliance posture.

facts.label: objective
facts.value: Keep The Light On in Real Estate Marketplace

fragments.title: Listing Reliability Incident Stabilization Sprint
fragments.description: A focused KTLO initiative to reduce critical production defects, tighten incident response loops, and remove the highest-severity reliability failures affecting Real Estate Marketplace operations.

fragments.title: Marketplace Workflow Debt Retirement
fragments.description: A KTLO initiative to reduce operational drag by refactoring brittle integrations, simplifying recovery paths, and removing legacy technical debt that slows change in Real Estate Marketplace.

fragments.title: Marketplace Patch Compliance Cycle
fragments.description: A KTLO initiative to keep the Real Estate Marketplace stack within security patch SLAs by upgrading vulnerable dependencies, rotating outdated components, and closing remediation gaps.

fragments.title: Archive Create stronger customer pull and adoption
fragments.description: Focus the period on customer outcomes that increase adoption, conversion, and trust in the core journey rather than output volume. Matches Empowered-style product objectives by centering on customer and business outcomes that teams can discover into.

fragments.title: Archive Make execution reliably repeatable
fragments.description: Improve the operating system behind the product so launches, service recovery, reliability, and cross-functional delivery become predictably repeatable. Keeps teams accountable for operational outcomes and avoids turning roadmap delivery into a checklist of feature shipments.

fragments.title: Archive Turn product progress into economic leverage
fragments.description: Translate better customer and operational outcomes into stronger revenue quality, retention, and strategic leverage for the business. Separates commercial results from activity metrics so leaders can evaluate whether product work is compounding into business value.

fragments.title: aws / aws-mysql-odbc

fragments.title: aws / aws-dotnet-deploy
fragments.description: Opinionated tooling that simplifies deployment of .NET applications to AWS.

fragments.title: aws / aws-xray-sdk-dotnet
fragments.description: The official AWS X-Ray SDK for .NET.

fragments.title: aws / aws-encryption-sdk-javascript
fragments.description: AWS Encryption SDK for Javascript and Node.js

fragments.title: aws / homebrew-aws
fragments.description: Homebrew is a package manager for macOS which provides easy installation and update management of additional software. This Tap (repository) contains the Formulae that are used in the macOS AMI that AWS offers.

fragments.title: aws / aws-sdk-js
fragments.description: AWS SDK for JavaScript in the browser and Node.js (In Maintenance Mode, End-of-Life on 09/08/2025). The AWS SDK for JavaScript v3 in the browser and Node.js is available here: https://github.com/aws/aws-sdk-js-v3

fragments.title: aws / aws-toolkit-vscode
fragments.description: Amazon Q, CodeCatalyst, Local Lambda debug, SAM/CFN syntax, ECS Terminal, AWS resources

fragments.title: aws / limitless-compatibility-assessment-tool
fragments.description: Limitless Compatibility Assessment Tool is a compatibility assessment tool for AWS Aurora PostgreSQL Limitless Database

fragments.title: aws / deep-learning-containers
fragments.description: AWS Deep Learning Containers are pre-built Docker images that make it easier to run popular deep learning frameworks and tools on AWS.

fragments.title: aws / aws-iot-fleetwise-edge
fragments.description: Reference Implementation for AWS IoT FleetWise

fragments.title: aws / aws-cdk-rfcs
fragments.description: RFCs for the AWS CDK

fragments.title: aws / aws-emr-containers-best-practices
fragments.description: Best practices and recommendations for getting started with Amazon EMR on EKS.

fragments.title: aws / aws-extensions-for-dotnet-cli
fragments.description: Extensions to the dotnet CLI to simplify the process of building and publishing .NET Core applications to AWS services

fragments.title: aws / lightsailctl
fragments.description: Amazon Lightsail CLI Extensions

fragments.title: aws / aws-rds-odbc
fragments.description: The Amazon Web Services (AWS) RDS Library for ODBC drivers allow the Amazon Web Services (AWS) ODBC drivers to take advantage of AWS RDS functionality inside an Amazon Aurora database (DB) cluster.

fragments.title: aws / pgcollection
fragments.description: A PostgreSQL extension to add a collection data type

fragments.title: aws / aws-for-fluent-bit
fragments.description: The source of the amazon/aws-for-fluent-bit container image

fragments.title: aws / aws-lambda-dotnet
fragments.description: Libraries, samples and tools to help .NET Core developers develop AWS Lambda functions.

fragments.title: aws / serverless-application-model
fragments.description: The AWS Serverless Application Model (AWS SAM) transform is a AWS CloudFormation macro that transforms SAM templates into CloudFormation templates.

fragments.title: aws / firelens-datajet
fragments.description: Route test data to Fluent Bit flexibly

fragments.title: aws / amazon-chime-sdk-ios
fragments.description: An iOS client library for integrating multi-party communications powered by the Amazon Chime service.

fragments.title: aws / amazon-chime-sdk-component-library-react
fragments.description: Amazon Chime React Component Library with integrations with the Amazon Chime SDK.

fragments.title: aws / aws-app-mesh-controller-for-k8s
fragments.description: A controller to help manage App Mesh resources for a Kubernetes cluster.

fragments.title: aws / aws-pgsql-odbc
fragments.description: The Amazon Web Services (AWS) ODBC Driver for PostgreSQL allows an application to take advantage of the features of clustered PostgreSQL databases. It is based on the PostgreSQL ODBC driver, and is compatible with all PostgreSQL deployments.

fragments.title: aws / aws-graviton-getting-started
fragments.description: Helping developers to use AWS Graviton2, Graviton3, and Graviton4 processors which power the 6th, 7th, and 8th generation of Amazon EC2 instances (C6g[d], M6g[d], R6g[d], T4g, X2gd, C6gn, I4g, Im4gn, Is4gen, G5g, C7g[d][n], M7g[d], R7g[d], R8g).

fragments.title: aws / aws-nitro-enclaves-sdk-c
fragments.description: This repo provides a C API for AWS Nitro Enclaves, including a KMS SDK that integrates it with attestation.

fragments.title: aws / aws-ec2-imdsv2-get
fragments.description: EC2 imds get tool to help with interfacing with IMDS on EC2 instances

fragments.title: aws / awsui-documentation
fragments.description: Information on how to get started using AWS UI components
